interpretation: The obstruction carries exactly one antisymmetric pair trace. The previous square-factor shortcut fails; the correct first normal form is first-difference, not second-difference.
name: Exterior Trace First-Difference Normal Form
relation_to_exterior_death: The exterior law kills repeated directions; this certificate identifies the surviving first pair-trace that must be controlled by barrier positivity rather than by naive S_24 symmetry.
remaining_target: Prove Q_w has the correct sign on the ordered barrier branch x_0>=x_1, B_w>=0, or produce a barrier multiplier/SOS decomposition.
statement: For w=12,16, the pairwise Schur obstruction polynomial P_w has an exact first exterior trace factor P_w=(x_0-x_1)Q_w.
verification: The certificate groups P_w by the 22 remaining exponents and verifies pair-total cancellation in x_0,x_1, equivalently zero remainder after division by x_0-x_1.
